english translation text: Allahumma Inni As Aluka An Taj’al

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
english translation text: O Allah, I beseech You to place, in what You destine and decree,

arabic text: مِنَ الأَمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ فِي الأَمْرِ الْحَكِيمِ
english translation text: from the orders which are definite, and orders which are wise,

arabic text: مِنَ الْقَضَاءِ الَّذِي لا يُرَدُّ وَلا يُبَدَّلُ
english translation text: from the decree which is neither reversed nor changed,

arabic text: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ
english translation text: write my name as one of the pilgrims of Your sacred house,

arabic text: الْمَبْرُورِ حَجُّهُمُ، الْمَشْكُورِ سَعْيُهُمُ،
english translation text: whose Hajj is approved, whose efforts are accepted,

arabic text: الْمَغْفُورِ ذُنُوبُهُمُ، الْمُكَفَّرِ عَنْ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ،
english translation text: whose sins are forgiven, and whose evil deeds are pardoned.

arabic text: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
english translation text: and place for me, in what You destine and decree,

arabic text: أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي فِي خَيْرٍ وَعَافِيَةٍ،
english translation text: lengthen my life, in goodness and health,

arabic text: وَتُوَسِّعَ في رِزْقِي،
english translation text: and an increase in my sustenance.

arabic text: وَتَجْعَلَنِي مِمَّنْ تَنْتَصِرُ بِهِ لِدِينِكَ
english translation text: Make me from among those through whom You support Your religion,

arabic text: وَلا تَسْتَبْدِلْ بِي غَيْرِي.
english translation text: And do not substitute me with anyone

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: أَعُوذُ بِجَلالِ وَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ
english translation text: I seek refuge with the majesty of Your gracious self.

arabic text: أَنْ يَنْقَضِيَ عَنِّي شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ
english translation text: from the passing of the month of Ramadhan,

arabic text: أَوْ يَطْلُعَ الْفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيْلَتِي هذِهِ
english translation text: or the appearance of the dawn of this night,

arabic text: وَلَكَ قِبَلِي تَبِعَةٌ أَوْ ذَنْبٌ تُعَذِّبُنِي عَلَيْهِ.
english translation text: while I still have a (pending) obligation which I have not carried out, or a sin that You may punish me for.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
